deployment_features.comparison_feature: Compares feature importance between disease prediction and systolic prediction models
deployment_features.classification_confidence_rule: max predicted class probability from classifier.predict_proba
deployment_features.regression_confidence_rule: 1 - MAE / predicted_systolic, clipped to 0-1; for educational deployment only
deployment_features.explainable_ai_rule: Uses built-in feature_importances_ from GradientBoostingClassifier and GradientBoostingRegressor to show top influential features; educational model explanation only
deployment_features.regression_status_rule: Normal if predicted systolic < 120 and input diastolic < 80; otherwise Tidak Normal
